depends_on.name: epochid
depends_on.documentation: The document ID of the epoch whose files were ingested.

fields.name: epoch_id
fields.documentation: Epoch identifier within the owning session (e.g., 't00001'). v1-faithful inline copy of the epoch's local name; the document-id link to the epoch lives in `depends_on[epochid]`.

fields.name: files
fields.documentation: List of file references ingested for this epoch. Entries are either NDI-scheme URIs (e.g., 'epochid://t00001') or absolute filesystem paths to the source files. Length varies per epoch (3-6 entries seen in the discovery corpora).

fields.name: epochprobemap
fields.documentation: Tab-separated epoch-probe-map text describing the probe configuration at ingest time. Free-form pass-through from v1; structure is `name\treference\ttype\tdevicestring\tsubjectstring\n<row>\n...`.
